concept.title: Error handling
concept.shortdesc: The API returns standard HTTP status codes and a consistent JSON error body.

ul.li: 400 Bad request (invalid JSON, missing required fields)
409 Conflict (idempotency conflict or invalid state transition)

section.title: Error response schema
section.p: Errors use a consistent JSON body:

section.title: Rate limits and retries
section.p: On HTTP 429, respect Retry-After and apply exponential backoff with jitter.
